title: Login failure after password reset
description: I reset my password earlier today, but now I can't log in. Each time I enter my new password, I get an 'Invalid credentials' error. I've verified the password meets the complexity requirements and tried both the web portal and the mobile app, but the issue persists. Please advise on how to resolve this login problem. For internal routing, please tag this with the relevant KB category and any non-sensitive diagnostic labels.
